relatedButOutOfScopeControllers: LlmSuggestionsController (/api/test-suites/{suiteId}/llm-suggestions) belongs to FE-15/FE-17 preview/review flow, not FE-06 direct generation.

notes: Current implementation only validates specificationId != Guid.Empty before generation.
Current implementation does not verify specificationId matches suite.ApiSpecId or the approved proposal spec.
At least one of includePathMutations/includeBodyMutations/includeLlmSuggestions must be true.
When the generation pipeline returns zero test cases, backend still returns 201 with totalGenerated=0.
On LLM cache hit, llmSuggestionCount may be > 0 while llmModel and llmTokensUsed remain null.
Generated summaries expose the runtime orderIndex assigned after all pipeline outputs are merged.
Current FE-06 generator assigns orderIndex sequentially starting at 0.
dependsOnIds contains test case IDs, not endpoint IDs.
testType and priority are strings in response because the view model uses enum.ToString().
Generated FE-06 cases are enabled=true by default.
Rule-based tags are auto-added by backend; frontend should not assume user-authored tags only.

properties: headers: string? (JSON object encoded as string)
pathParams: string? (JSON object encoded as string)
queryParams: string? (JSON object encoded as string)
notes: Path mutation cases usually populate pathParams and leave body null.
Body mutation cases set bodyType=JSON even when body is null or empty string.
LLM-suggested request headers/path params/query params are also serialized into JSON strings.

properties: expectedStatus: string? (JSON int array encoded as string)
headerChecks: string? (JSON object encoded as string)
bodyContains: string? (JSON string array encoded as string)
bodyNotContains: string? (JSON string array encoded as string)
jsonPathChecks: string? (JSON object encoded as string)
notes: Path mutation cases may expect [200], [400], or [404] depending on the mutation.
Body mutation cases default expectedStatus to [400].
LLM suggestions default expectedStatus to [400] when the upstream payload omits or leaves the list empty.
Rule-based FE-06 cases usually have no variables; variableCount is commonly > 0 only for LLM-suggested cases.

endpoints.name: GenerateBoundaryNegativeTestCases
problemCases: 400 ProblemDetails for empty suiteId/specificationId, all pipeline flags false, non-owner access, archived suite, existing boundary/negative cases without forceRegenerate, subscription limit denial, or LLM call limit denial.
409 ProblemDetails with reasonCode=ORDER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED when FE-05A gate has not produced an applied order yet.
notes: On non-empty success, backend persists generated cases, adds change logs, increments suite.Version, and sets suite.Status=Ready.
If forceRegenerate=true, backend deletes existing Boundary/Negative cases before generating new ones.

If the generator returns zero cases, backend still responds 201 but does not update suite.Status or suite.Version; when forceRegenerate=true this can leave the suite with zero Boundary/Negative cases.
Path mutation, body mutation, and LLM suggestion cases are merged into one sequential orderIndex stream starting at 0.
LLM cache hits still contribute to llmSuggestionCount, but llmModel and llmTokensUsed stay null in the current response shape.

endpoints.name: ListTestCases
notes: Use testType=Boundary or testType=Negative to isolate FE-06 results.
Current query handler does not enforce suite ownership; only permission and suite existence are checked.
Invalid testType values are ignored silently because Enum.TryParse failure leaves filter unset.
When includeDisabled is false, disabled test cases are excluded.

endpoints.name: GetTestCaseDetail
problemCases: 404 when testCaseId does not exist in the suite.
notes: This is a shared detail endpoint for all test types, not FE-06-only.
Current query handler does not enforce suite ownership; only permission and entity existence are checked.

runtimeRules: Generate-boundary-negative requires FE-05A gate to pass via an active proposal with non-empty AppliedOrder, not just suite approvalStatus.
Current implementation does not verify specificationId matches suite.ApiSpecId or the approved proposal spec before generation.
forceRegenerate only removes existing Boundary and Negative cases before re-generating.
Path mutation classification maps mutationType containing boundary/zero/max/overflow to TestType=Boundary; other path mutations become TestType=Negative.
Generated cases are tagged with boundary/negative, auto-generated, and a source tag; rule-based cases also add path-mutation or body-mutation.
Body mutation engine returns no cases for non-POST/PUT/PATCH endpoints.
Read endpoints return serialized JSON-string fields inside request and expectation submodels.
List endpoint sorts by OrderIndex and has no pagination.
LLM cache is all-or-nothing per ordered endpoint set and current feedback fingerprint; current response shape has no explicit fromCache flag.

testCases.name: POST /api/orders - duplicate idempotency key with stale payload

boundaryListItem.name: GET /api/users/{id} - id - max int32
boundaryListItem.description: Boundary max int32 cho path param id.
